name: Miglior Canned Cat Food - Salmon Chunks, 405g
description: Treat your cat to the taste of the ocean with this protein-rich recipe made from real salmon chunks in a savory gravy. Carefully formulated to deliver everyday nutrition, this meal supports your cat’s skin, coat, and overall well-being with every delicious bite. Real Salmon Chunks: Naturally rich in Omega-3 fatty acids and protein to support brain function, joint health, and a glossy coat. Savory Gravy Base: Moist, appetizing texture that enhances flavor and keeps even picky eaters satisfied. Daily Nutrient Support: Balanced with essential vitamins and minerals to promote strong immunity, digestion, and vitality. Why Your Cat Will Love It: All-Natural Ingredients – No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives Soft, Meaty Texture – Salmon chunks in rich gravy Supports Skin & Coat Health – With Omega-3s from real salmon Immune & Digestive Support – Fortified with key vitamins and nutrients Complete & Balanced – Perfect for daily feeding COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 30%, fish and fish derivatives (salmon 5%), cereals, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 77%, Crude protein 8.5%, Crude fat 4.8%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: Serve at room temperature to bring out full flavor and aroma Feed as a complete meal or mix with dry food for variety Adjust portion size based on your cat’s weight and lifestyle Store any unused portion in the fridge and use within 48 hours STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
